commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds QA Lab script-producer helpers and tests, a Gateway child fixture, Docker E2E lane help/listing support, and removes a broad QA transport re-export.

PR surface: Source -13, Tests +605, Other +38. Total +630 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the boundary failure: the live check annotations identify the offending import, and source inspection shows the new non-extension test/helper imports QA Lab internals. The Windows cleanup issue is source-reproducible by comparing the new runner with existing QA process-tree cleanup paths.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A repair worker can address the concrete owner-boundary and Windows cleanup blockers without needing a product decision.

target.title: test(qa): add script producer e2e fixtures
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Finishes step 1 of the real-E2E QA cleanup plan after #97915 by adding reusable QA Lab script-producer scaffolding and cleaning up the broad transport-scenario re-export.

The goal is to make future script-to-QA migrations produce honest QA evidence without each scenario reimplementing artifact paths, evidence summaries, command logs, child process timeout cleanup, or Gateway child setup.

## Why This Change Was Made

- Adds `test/e2e/qa-lab/lib/script-producer.ts` for shared QA script producer option parsing, artifact writes, evidence bundle generation, and bounded child-command execution.
- Adds regression coverage for producer evidence output, command logging, timeout force-settlement, and detached process-group cleanup.
- Adds `test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/gateway-child-script.fixture.ts` so script producers that need a real Gateway can share the QA bus/provider/Gateway child setup.
- Expands `scripts/qa/docker-e2e-lane.ts` with remaining existing Docker lane names and a `--list`/`--help` surface for QA scenario adapters.
- Removes the broad re-export of `qa-transport-scenarios` from `live-transport-scenarios.ts`; callers should import the QA transport helpers directly from their canonical module.

## User Impact

No taxonomy IDs or product runtime behavior change. This is QA infrastructure for making future QA Lab scenarios more meaningful and less duplicated while preserving tight child-process cleanup for E2E/script producers.

## Evidence

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/e2e/qa-lab/lib/script-producer.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-qa.config.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/qa-transport-scenarios.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-runtime-api.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/qa-channel-transport.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/crabline-transport.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite-runtime-flow.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/shared/live-transport-scenarios.ts scripts/qa/docker-e2e-lane.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/lib/script-producer.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/lib/script-producer.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/gateway-child-script.fixture.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode commit --commit HEAD` clean after accepted fixes
target.author: romneyda

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
